product_updates.title: ByteDance reportedly pauses global launch of its Seedance 2.0 video generator
product_updates.content: The company is reportedly delaying the launch as its engineers and lawyers work to avert further legal issues.

product_updates.title: Lawyer behind AI psychosis cases warns of mass casualty risks
product_updates.content: AI chatbots have been linked to suicides for years. Now one lawyer says they are showing up in mass casualty cases too, and the technology is moving faster than the safeguards.

product_updates.title: Wiz investor unpacks Google’s $32B acquisition
product_updates.content: Shardul Shah of Index Ventures walks us through Google's biggest acquisition ever.
